expectations.text: Recommends v1 for new work; identifies v0 as legacy and directs the user not to populate v0 tables for new sessions
expectations.evidence: 'use v1 for any fresh session today. v0 is the legacy pipeline ... you should not be populating new v0 tables'.

expectations.text: Routes to spikesorting_v0_legacy.md only for querying pre-v1 sortings, not for new work
expectations.evidence: Doesn't name the .md file (no skill access) but routes v0 to read-only/legacy use only: 'Treat the spyglass.spikesorting.v0 import as read-only ... go through SpikeSortingOutput.CuratedSpikeSorting'.

expectations.text: Does not recommend v0 for new sessions or as the default — v0 is for reading legacy data only
expectations.evidence: 'Don't populate any v0 tables for new sessions ... For brand-new sessions, do the entire pipeline on v1 and ignore v0 entirely'.
